'''Kellenech Technologies''' produced the [[LB-series bulk-loading droid|T1-series bulk-loading droid]] prior to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. When the company collapsed in the following years, its resources were liquidated and the "T1"-series trademark was purchased by [[Duwani Mechanical Products/Legends|Duwani Mechanical Products]]. As a result, the defunct company's T1 line of droids became better known as the "LB" series, perhaps so as to differentiate it from a [[T1-series utility droid|new and unrelated line of T1 droids]] being produced by Duwani. Kellenech Technologies also made the [[KT-400 military droid carrier|KT-400]], a military droid carrier used during the [[Mandalorian Wars]] and [[Jedi Civil War]].
